_documentation.description: Maps inventory component types to Layer 1 canonical entities used by Neo4j loader scripts.

unmapped_component_types.model: Skipped. Represents the hardware device model configuration, handled at the Device node level.
unmapped_component_types.device_type: Skipped. Represents the classification of the device (e.g. server, workstation), stored as a Device property.
unmapped_component_types.cpu: Unmapped. Represents host processor hardware; currently not modeled as an Entity node in Layer 1.
unmapped_component_types.hba: Unmapped. Host Bus Adapters; currently treated as generic hardware components.
unmapped_component_types.network_adapter: Unmapped. Network interface card hardware; currently treated as generic hardware.
unmapped_component_types.raid_controller: Unmapped. RAID disk array controller hardware; currently treated as generic hardware.
unmapped_component_types.storage_controller: Unmapped. Disk storage controller hardware; currently treated as generic hardware.
